notes: Real PNG icons for Media Session and the manifest. The previous SVG-only icon set was being treated by Android Chrome as 'no usable raster artwork', which downgrades the page from rich-media-app status and pauses background audio when the user minimizes the app or turns off the screen. Generated headphones-192.png, headphones-512.png plus maskable variants from the same shape, declared them in manifest.webmanifest (purpose any + maskable), passed the 192/512 PNGs as MediaMetadata artwork, and pre-cached them in the service worker. SW cache bumped to v24 so the new shell rolls out cleanly.
